Top-Rated, Health-Safe Restaurants in Sanford

Both halves check out across all 25 of these Sanford restaurants: an A on the inspection and high marks from diners. CHEDDAR'S CASUAL CAFE grades a perfect 100/100.

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →
